name: Nao
description: Mitsumi's paternal aunt. She is a transgender woman and works as a stylist. Mitsumi's guardian since she moved to Tokyo.

name: Nino
description: A mysterious girl who lives in Arakawa. She is a self-claimed Venusian and later Kou's girlfriend. The origin of her name comes from the sweatsuit that she always wear that has the tag "Class 2-3" (Ni-no-san) on it. She is an incredible swimmer and can stay submerge for several minutes. With this skill Nino commonly goes fishing in the river and it is her job in the village to provide fish for the residents. She often forgets important information and often needs Kou to remind her. description: The playable protagonist of the game Genshin Impact.

name: Kotoha Tachibana
description: Kotoha works at Café Pothos. Her friendly and brave personality makes her seem like an adult, but just like Sakura and the others, she’s only 16. As manager of Café Pothos, she serves the best menu to the students at Furin High School and the local townspeople everyday. She will admonish Sakura for his actions from time to time. name: Hoozuki
description: Hoozuki is the talented, sadistic deputy of the King of Hell, Enma. He tries to solve various problems in Hell. In his spare time, he takes care of the animals and raises Goldfish grass. (Source: Hoozuki no Reitetsu Wiki)

name: Isidro
description: A runaway brat turned thief, Isidro dreams of becoming a great swordsman, which made him tag along with Guts. Despite his lack of strength and skill, he utilizes his small size and agility to his advantage, along with various tricks and tools. He has a great ego and plans to become the very best; he initially planned to "observe" Guts and steal his "techniques" to surpass him. But he slowly starts to realize the inconceivable difference in strength between him and Guts, but that there may even b

name: Konohamaru Sarutobi
description: Konohamaru named after the village he lives in: Konoha, is the grandson of the Third Hokage and by extension the nephew of Asuma Sarutobi. Konohamaru usually hangs out with his two friends, Udon and Moegi. Together, they call themselves the "Konohamaru Corps" ("Konohamaru Ninja Squad" in the English dub). In Part II they are teamed together under the leadership of Ebisu, Konohamaru's former tutor. At the start of the series, Konohamaru feels unacknowledged due to his status as the Hokage's grand

name: May Chang
description: The seventeenth princess of Xing (the lowest ranked house), who like Ling Yao, travels west searching for the Philosopher's Stone so she can become the empress and secure the future of her family. She travels along with her pet mini-panda, Xiao Mei. Adept at Xing's style of alchemy, called Alchahastry, she use throwing knives to arrange transmutation circles in order to manipulate targets at long range. A ardent fan of Edward Elric because of the way he helps people with alchemy, her image of hi

name: Tetia
description: Tetia is a young witch in training at Qifrey's Atelier. She loves clouds and dreams of creating the perfect cloud magic. She's perpetually energetic and has a habit of thanking people for thanking her. Tetia is an extremely upbeat, loving girl that tries to help everyone she knows and keep the mood high.She is also the one who often gets everyone grounded and keeps the mood up by being loving to her friends.

name: Hiroto Kiyama
description: Hiroto was the captain of Genesis, the supreme team of Aliea Academy. Later on he joins Inazuma Japan in FFI.

name: Koto
description: An indifferent young girl who holds many secrets. Surprisingly, she likes cute things like stuffed animals.

name: Kyouko Otonashi
description: Kyouko is the manager of the apartment. She lives in the kanrinin's (managers) room of Ikkoku-kan. She has recently recovered from her husband's death​ and is trying to figure out her life, between keeping the memory of Souichirou-san alive and her own feelings for other people. Her dog is named Souichirou-san after her late husband. She is still on the Otonashi family register, but her parents want her to get off and come home or remarry.
